reason: Verified that agent can use GitHub tool to check authenticated user and return GitHub username
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with agent sidebar visible
Clicked on "QA-20260418-190644-9nry" agent in sidebar — Agent page opened and displayed
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status was "idle" as required

Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message sent successfully, agent transitioned to "working" state, session "GitHub Username Verification Request" created
Account access request card appeared for GitHub — Card displayed asking to allow access to GitHub
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account access — Access granted successfully, agent resumed processing with Bash tool execution
API request review dialog appeared for GitHub GET /user — Allowed the request via "Allow Once" option
Waited for response completion — Response received successfully within 33 seconds (well within 4-minute limit)
Verified response includes GitHub username — Response displays "Your GitHub username is yiw190." — Took final screenshot documenting the result
